title: Camp features
description: Facilities and activity offerings present at a camp (multi-valued on camp.features). Seeded from camp-finder.

terms.label: Dining Hall
terms.description: A central building where meals are served.

terms.label: Waterfront
terms.description: Lake or river frontage used for aquatics activities.

terms.label: Shooting Sports
terms.description: Ranges for activities such as rifle, shotgun, or archery.

terms.label: COPE
terms.description: Challenging Outdoor Personal Experience: a ropes and team-challenge course.

terms.label: Older-Scout Program
terms.description: Dedicated programming for older or more experienced participants.

terms.label: High-Adventure Option
terms.description: An optional high-adventure track offered at the camp.

terms.label: STEM
terms.description: Science, technology, engineering, and math programming, including NOVA.
